summary: Iter24 Feature Flags por tenant — fully validated end-to-end. Backend: 20/20 PASS (helpers, registry, GET features, PUT toggle, 403/400/404 errors, audit_log, branding includes features). Regression: /api/superadmin/metrics 200, /api/superadmin/tenants/usage 200, /api/auth/tenant/branding still returns logo_url/business_name/primary_color + new `features` dict with all 8 registry keys. Frontend: SuperAdmin panel → click tenant 'demo-inmobiliaria' (data-testid='tenant-demo-inmobiliaria') expands → 'Feature Flags' button (data-testid='feature-flags-btn-demo-inmobiliaria') opens panel (data-testid='feature-flags-demo-inmobiliaria') with 8 toggles grouped by category (Bot WhatsApp visible). Toggle click flips 'Inactivo' ↔ 'Activo' and persists (PUT 200 + state survives page state). Toggle back to default works (cleanup OK).

issues: Category section headers (e.g. 'BOT WHATSAPP') do not expose data-testid like 'ff-category-bot' — minor; flags themselves are testable via toggle-flag-{key}. Not blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: feature_flags.has_feature correctly handles bool|dict overrides and unknown features → False (defensive).
update_tenant_feature returns False if feature unknown OR tenant not found via matched_count — endpoint maps to 400/404 correctly using prior FEATURE_FLAGS check.
Audit log entry inserted in the same handler — atomicity not guaranteed if mongo write fails after update, acceptable for audit.
Branding endpoint resolves features through get_tenant_features so defaults always present even on freshly seeded tenants — robust.
Frontend useFeature hook with module-level cache: ensure cache is invalidated on logout/tenant switch (verify on relogin scenarios).
seed_data_creation: None new. reset_demo_features fixture in test_iter24_feature_flags.py wipes tenants.demo-inmobiliaria.features={} before/after each test. Frontend toggles were reset to default during test (mortgage_calculator confirmed False post-test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter24 Feature Flags fully GREEN. Endpoint paths: GET /api/superadmin/feature-flags/registry, GET/PUT /api/superadmin/tenants/{tid}/features. Branding response now includes `features` dict (8 keys). UI: tenant card uses data-testid='tenant-{tid}' (NOT 'tenant-card-{tid}'); click card to expand → 'Feature Flags' button toggles inline panel. Note: task description mentions endpoints /api/superadmin/global-metrics and /api/superadmin/tenants-metrics — these are 404; actual endpoints are /api/superadmin/metrics and /api/superadmin/tenants/usage (both 200, working since iter17). Total backend regression: iter24 20/20 + previous suites unchanged.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found. Implementation matches spec; tests pass; no regressions detected.
